product_overview: LeadFlow AI is an AI-powered sales operations platform that helps agencies and service businesses turn raw leads into qualified sales conversations. It supports the end-to-end workflow from lead import and qualification to outreach, reply analysis, follow-up, and pipeline tracking.
core_goals: Import and organize leads from the platform
Qualify leads and identify high-priority opportunities
Generate personalized outreach messages for leads
Track and move leads through the sales pipeline
Review the product, pricing, and system settings through public pages

features.name: Landing Page Interactivity
features.description: A public marketing landing page that introduces the product, showcases its value, and drives visitors toward the app or demo experience.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll down the page -> Observe animated product storytelling and feature highlights -> Click to open the demo walkthrough overlay -> Close the overlay -> Navigate to /dashboard
Navigate to / -> Click to book or watch a demo -> See the modal walkthrough overlay
Navigate to / -> Click to get started -> Navigate to /dashboard

features.name: Pricing Controls & FAQs
features.description: An interactive pricing page that lets visitors compare billing options and review common questions before choosing a plan.
user_flows: Navigate to /pricing -> Switch the billing frequency -> Observe monthly and annual prices update -> Expand a FAQ item -> Read the answer
Navigate to /pricing -> Expand multiple FAQ items -> Review pricing and product details

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: A dashboard that summarizes lead performance, channels, and recent activity so users can monitor sales progress at a glance.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View lead metric cards -> Inspect the charts and channel breakdown -> Review recent activity entries
Navigate to /dashboard -> Hover over chart points -> Observe detailed chart values

features.name: Leads Repository & Import
features.description: A leads workspace where users can search and filter lead records, then import new leads through a CSV-based flow.
user_flows: Navigate to /leads -> Enter a search term -> Apply a status filter -> Review the matching leads list
Navigate to /leads -> Open the CSV import flow -> Start the AI diagnostics import -> See leads added to the repository
Navigate to /leads -> Enter a search term that matches no records -> See an empty filtered results state

features.name: Kanban Board Deal Movement
features.description: A horizontal pipeline board that lets users move deal cards across sales stages.
user_flows: Navigate to /pipeline -> Select a deal card -> Move it to the next stage -> See the card appear in the updated column
Navigate to /pipeline -> Select a deal card -> Move it to the previous stage -> See the card return to an earlier column

features.name: System Settings
features.description: A settings area for configuring the AI representative identity, outreach behavior, diagnostic cadence, and CRM or AI credentials.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Enter an AI representative name -> Adjust outreach style and diagnostic frequency -> Save changes -> See the updated configuration
Navigate to /settings -> Enter HubSpot, Salesforce, or OpenAI API keys -> Save changes -> See credentials stored in settings

routes.description: AI representative settings and secret credentials

features.name: Landing Page Interactivity
features.description: Public landing page featuring pipeline loops, scrolltelling tracks, feature glows, and demo video popups.
user_interactions: Scroll down the page to trigger scrolltelling animations
Click "Watch Demo" or "Book Demo" to trigger modal walkthrough overlay

features.name: Pricing Controls & FAQs
features.description: Interactive pricing cards with frequency toggle and FAQ accordion drop-downs.
user_interactions: Click the billing toggle button to swap monthly/annual prices
Click a FAQ question header to expand its answer

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Dashboard view showcasing lead metrics, charts, channels breakdown, and activity streams.
user_interactions: View Total Leads, Qualified Leads, Conversations, and Conversion Rate cards
Hover over Recharts area chart line points
View Top Channels donut piechart and Recent Activity logs

features.name: Leads Repository & Import
features.description: Leads list table with text search, status filters, and mock CSV ingestion.
user_interactions: Enter query into the search input box
Click status filters (ALL, HOT, WARM, COLD)
Click "Upload CSV" button to trigger import dialog
Click "Start AI Diagnostics" in import dialog to mock import leads

features.name: Kanban Board Deal Movement
features.description: Horizontal Kanban board allowing card movements between stages.
user_interactions: Click the left and right arrow buttons on pipeline cards to move them across stages

features.name: System Settings
features.description: Operations settings form for AI representative naming and third-party CRM API keys.
user_interactions: Input AI Agent representative identity name
Change outbox pitch style or diagnostic frequency options
Input API keys for HubSpot, Salesforce, or OpenAI
